title: Create: Ethium Reimagined
description: Ethium is a Create addon that adds a powerful new metal with a complex crafting process involving fluids, automation, and late-game progression.
body:
![Tools and Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LqRruywl/images/4b6922868c1053e534c9a01c5f172ce7daa0ba0f_350.webp)

**Ethium** is a Create mod addon that introduces a powerful late-game metal for players who want an extra challenge. Tougher than Netherite, Ethium can’t be crafted by hand; you actually need complex automation to produce. It ranges from refining rare materials to brewing new fluids, and much more. The process demands advanced setups and careful engineering. The reward is worth it, though: the mod unlocks new tools, armor, and progression paths for players who love building massive factories, going on big adventures, and pushing Create to its limits!

 

Join the [Discord](https://discord.gg/sj8QjJgncQ) for questions and feedback :)
